comment: Curated allowlist for the headless behavioral tier. Each entry is generated, its single `platform: node` (Hono) deployable booted on PGlite, and its emitted suites run. CONSTRAINT: exactly one node backend per system, so dispatch (host-agnostic, path-matched) is unambiguous — multi-backend systems (showcase, examples/acme) stay in the docker `conformance-full` leg. `api` runs the emitted `e2e/<Sys>.e2e.test.ts` (run.mjs); `unit` runs the emitted pure-domain `*.test.ts` (run.mjs); `ui` runs the emitted `*.ui.spec.ts` Playwright round-trips against a built+served frontend wired to the backend (run-ui.mjs). `ui: false` = the system has no `test e2e … against <frontend>` block. `uiTier: "nightly"` = the UI round-trip runs only in the nightly frontend-fullstack matrix (run-ui.mjs --all), NOT the per-PR behavioral-ui gate — used to cover non-React frontends against a real backend without adding their build cost to every PR (default tier is per-PR).
